title: veronica schmidtiana subsp. bandaiana
intro: Veronica schmidtiana subsp. bandaiana, also known as Bandaiana Veronica or Veronica Bandaiana, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It is commonly found in the Himalayas and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Veronica schmidtiana subsp. bandaiana is often made into a tea or decoction, and is also used as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
